path.description: Issue location as a path array or string (legacy shape).

pointer.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer to the invalid location.

info.description: Prototype-viewer server API. Generated from the route-contract registry (server/contracts.ts); regenerate with `npm run generate:openapi`. Operations marked `x-easyui-validated: false` document handlers that validate input independently of the contract schemas.
info.title: easy-ui API

get.summary: List assets in reverse creation order with hard-pin usage counts and keyset pagination.

post.summary: Upload a content-addressed asset (raw body with Content-Type, or a single-file multipart form).

get.summary: Fetch asset bytes with immutable caching and hardened, inert delivery headers.
List every hard pin retaining an asset, including tombstoned visual references and visual-run roles.
Return the current named user.
Machine-readable feature discovery: actions, directives, param sources, conditions, limits, design systems.
Manifest of the latest active custom-component versions across design systems.
List custom components with head revision and latest active version.

post.summary: Create a custom component from TSX source (syntax-checked and definition-extracted).

delete.summary: Soft-delete a component (CAS on baseRev). Responds 204 without a body.

get.summary: Component lifecycle meta: head revision, versions, validated revision, renderable.

put.summary: Save a new head revision of source and/or move the component between design systems (CAS on baseRev).

get.summary: Alias of /source: read the head revision source.

post.summary: Publish the head revision: typecheck, compile, import-verify and activate the next version.
Restore an older source revision as a new head revision.

get.summary: List source revisions (newest first).
Read a specific source revision.
Read the head revision source.
List published versions with lifecycle status.
Read a published version: source, definition metadata, bundle hash, ABI, asset pins.
Fetch the compiled ESM bundle of an active version (immutable cache headers).

post.summary: Enqueue a published-component screenshot job with optional props or a named example.
Transition a published version's lifecycle status (transition matrix, CAS by statusRev).

get.summary: List registered design systems (builtin + custom) with catalogs and latest theme content.
Read one design system summary.

patch.summary: Append an immutable theme version (tokens/fonts/icons) to a custom design system (CAS on baseVersion).

get.summary: Read an immutable design-system theme version.
Liveness/readiness: 200 ready, 503 while starting. Exempt from BasicAuth.
OpenAPI 3.1 document generated from this contract registry (committed as server/openapi.json).
List prototypes with head revision and latest published version.

post.summary: Create a prototype from a document (revision 1); validates against the design-system catalog.

delete.summary: Delete a prototype (CAS on baseRev). Responds 204 without a body.

get.summary: Prototype lifecycle meta: head/draft revision, validated revision, published versions, renderable.

put.summary: Save a new head revision (CAS on baseRev); document id must match the path id.

get.summary: Read the head revision document with catalog hashes, component pins and asset pins.

post.summary: Publish the head revision as the next immutable version; returns canonical screen URLs.
Restore an older revision as a new head revision (copies component/asset pins).

get.summary: List revisions (newest first) with cursor pagination.
Read a specific immutable revision.
Compare two immutable prototype revisions, including document, pin and render-input changes.
Report whether a prototype screen is renderable (document, bundles, local route).

post.summary: Enqueue a prototype-screen screenshot job; resolves the target snapshot atomically.

get.summary: List active, unexpired share grants without disclosing their bearer tokens.

post.summary: Create a time-limited public share grant pinned to an immutable published version.

delete.summary: Revoke a share grant and immediately invalidate all sessions minted from it.

post.summary: Change prototype visibility using the server-enforced lifecycle graph.

get.summary: List published versions.
Read a published version (immutable cache headers).
JSON Schema of the exported custom-component `definition` contract.
JSON Schema of the prototype document format, with directive annotations ($state/$bindState/$template/$cond/$asset and event param sources).
Poll a screenshot job (queued|running|done|error) and read its result.
Host-provided ESM shims for published bundles (abi v1: react/zod/…; v2 additionally easy-ui/runtime).
List users (admin only).
Read the latest committed visual baseline set for a prototype.

put.summary: Atomically replace the complete committed visual baseline set for a prototype (generation CAS).

get.summary: List visual references (optionally filtered by scope/prototypeId/componentId) with the last run.

put.summary: Upsert a visual reference by canonical fingerprint (asset must exist and be a PNG).

delete.summary: Tombstone an active visual reference while retaining its runs and evidence.

get.summary: Fetch a visual reference with its full run history.

post.summary: Capture a candidate for the reference fingerprint and enqueue an honest diff run.

get.summary: Poll a visual run: a running placeholder, or the terminal evidence report.
